hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; git fetch origin claude/aces-coordination -q 2>/dev/null; f=$(git ls-tree --name-only origin/claude/aces-coordination mailbox/ 2>/dev/null | sort | tail -2); [ -n "$f" ] && { echo '== ACES agent mailbox (newest 2; branch claude/aces-coordination; read PROTOCOL.md there before working) =='; for m in $f; do echo "-- $m --"; git show "origin/claude/aces-coordination:$m" 2>/dev/null; done; } || true
